influence of cell towers in a neighbourhood of Madrid, and how can

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

files.fileName: Maths AA HL final draft Javier Ortiz.pdf

strengths: Clear narrative structure following introduction, methods, results and conclusion
Effective use of headings and labelled figures to guide the reader
Most content directly supports the research question with logical progression
weaknesses: Formatting errors in tables (garbled characters, mis-aligned data) interrupt professional presentation
Occasional abrupt transitions (e.g., to Excel output, Figure 9 integration) break flow
Verbatim algorithm descriptions and redundant IB codes add bulk without insight
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates clear coherence and logical development (band 3) with an adequate organizational structure and mostly relevant content. Occasional formatting lapses and superfluous details prevent it from reaching the top band, so a score of 3 accurately reflects its solid but not exceptional presentation.

strengths: Consistent use of standard mathematical notation for mid-points, gradients and sets
Effective integration of diagrams, tables and algebraic equations to support arguments
Logical sequencing of explanations accompanies almost every calculation
weaknesses: Inconsistent rendering of subscripts/superscripts and one lost negative-reciprocal sign reduces clarity
Corrupted tables (e.g., OCR errors in Nearest Neighbour steps) hinder readability
Inline equations mixed with narrative obscure communication at points
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and notation are mostly accurate, multiple representations are effectively used, and the argument is logically structured (all band 3 features). Occasional notation lapses and formatting corruption prevent an excellent band 4 performance, justifying a score of 3.

strengths: Personal context (connectivity at grandparentsâ house) grounds the exploration in genuine motivation
Combines two distinct mathematical models (Voronoi and TSP) and environmental considerations
Evaluation proposes realistic improvements showing initiative
weaknesses: Heavy reliance on textbook algorithms with limited modification shows moderate independence
No novel modelling choices (e.g., weighted Voronoi, stochastic methods) to push boundaries
Personal approach is clear but not highly innovative
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation shows significant independent thinking and a clear personal approach with good creativity (band 2) but does not demonstrate the outstanding originality or depth of initiative required for band 3. A score of 2 reflects this mid-band performance.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on the importance of results and limitations of assumptions
Thoughtful analysis of outcomes with qualitative evaluation of coverage and emissions
Suggestions for improvements indicate clear consideration of future implications
weaknesses: Reflection remains descriptive without deep quantitative or sensitivity analysis
Lacks probing critique of algorithmic efficiency or unexpected findings
No implementation or measurement of proposed alternative approaches
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is present throughout and demonstrates thoughtful analysis and clear evaluation of outcomes (band 2). However, the absence of substantial critical depth or comprehensive future-oriented implications prevents a band 3 rating. Thus a score of 2 is appropriate.

strengths: Relevant mathematical methods (Voronoi geometry, TSP heuristics, fuel-emission conversions) directly tie to research objectives
Mathematics is fully commensurate with SL/HL level and applied appropriately in context
Derivations and numerical results are generally sound, demonstrating good conceptual grasp
weaknesses: Sign error in the negative-reciprocal gradient step indicates a lapse in accuracy
Unreadable or corrupted algorithm tables (Primâs, Nearest Neighbour) hinder full correctness
Lacks depth in algorithmic complexity analysis or formal proof for a higher band
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration uses relevant mathematics effectively and demonstrates solid understanding with mostly correct results (band 4). While broad in scope and accurately applied, occasional errors and lack of advanced depth prevent it reaching band 5 or 6. A score of 4 therefore fairly represents its strong but not yet expert use of mathematics.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations accompany almost every calculation, so the reader can follow the argument, and most justifications are logically sequenced. However, occasional formatting corruption (e.g., inline equations mixed with narrative) obscures clarity, and some algorithmic tables contain unexplained symbols. Thus the logical communication is good rather than excellent.

Derivations are generally sound and give correct numerical results; nonetheless, the perpendicular-bisector slope sign error and unreadable Primâs table indicate lapses. Explanations show good conceptual grasp, and errors are limited so overall understanding is âgood and mostly correctâ, aligning with band 4 rather than lower or the entirely correct upper bands.

The IA integrates diagrams (Google-Earth map, Voronoi overlay, weighted graph), tables of coordinates/distances and algebraic equations. These representations are generally clear and support understanding, though Figure 9 is unreadable in parts and the Voronoi boundaries are visually cluttered. Effectiveness is good but short of âhighly effectiveâ.

The exploration follows a clear narrative: introduction of the real-world problem, construction of the Voronoi diagram, application of three TSP-related algorithms, and concluding evaluation. Transitions between sections are generally smooth and the mathematics appears in a logical order that the reader can follow. Nevertheless, occasional jumps in explanation (e.g., sudden reference to Excel output or poorly integrated Figure 9) interrupt the flow, preventing the piece from achieving the consistently seamless development expected in the top band.

Including fuel and emission calculations and combining two different mathematical models demonstrates creativity and initiative beyond a single-topic study. However, the creativity remains within well-trodden boundaries and no sophisticated innovation (e.g., coding, stochastic simulation) is attempted, keeping the strand in the mid band.

The evaluation lists multiple assumptions (signal strength, traffic, terrain) and discusses their effect qualitatively. There is some thoughtful analysis, but no quantitative sensitivity testing or critique of algorithmic efficiency. Insight therefore reaches a thoughtful but not deep level.

Outcomes are compared against real-world expectations (interval for route length, fuel/emission tables) and several improvements are proposed. The student does not, however, attempt to implement alternates or measure impact of suggested changes, so the evaluation is âclearâ rather than âcomprehensiveâ.

The student reflects on why results matter (coverage identification, cost/environmental implications) and how assumptions limit validity. Reflection appears at several points rather than a single paragraph, indicating meaningful engagement. Still, commentary is descriptive and stops short of probing underlying mathematical robustness, so depth is moderate.

The student employs standard notation for mid-points, gradients, inequalities and sets out algorithms in list form. Most symbols are correct, yet the negative-reciprocal sign is lost in one place and subscripts/superscripts sometimes render poorly (e.g., CO<sub>2</sub>). These lapses reduce consistency but overall usage is appropriate.

The narrative is clearly framed around the studentâs grandparents and the local neighbourhood, displaying a personal approach. Yet much of the execution mirrors standard examples; the investigation does not venture into novel modelling choices (e.g., weighted Voronoi or heuristic comparisons) that would make the approach highly personal.

Most content directly supports the research question; however, lengthy verbatim algorithm descriptions and duplicated sample calculations add bulk without new insight. Minor digressions about airline routes and government subsidies further reduce conciseness. Overall relevance is high but not consistently tight enough for the top mark.

Voronoi geometry, graph-theoretic algorithms, and distance-to-fuel conversions are all directly relevant to the stated aims and are applied correctly for the most part. Coverage is broad and ties purposefully to each research objective, demonstrating effective use of mathematics, though not yet âcomprehensiveâ enough for band 5.

Selecting a personally observed connectivity issue, choosing only the providerâs towers and extending to fuel-emission analysis shows deliberate personal direction and some independent decisions. Still, the mathematical techniques themselves closely follow textbook algorithms with limited original adaptation, so evidence of independent thinking is significant but not outstanding.

There is a recognizable structure with introduction, aim/rationale, method, results, conclusion and evaluation. Headings are used effectively and most figures are labelled. Formatting errors in several tables (garbled characters, mis-aligned data) and superfluous repeated IB codes weaken the professionalism, so the organisation is good rather than exceptional.

The mathematics sits comfortably at HL level: coordinate geometry, discrete optimisation, MST/TSP heuristics and environmental modelling with units. The work is fully commensurate with HL expectations and applied in context, but lacks the depth and rigour (e.g., algorithmic complexity analysis, formal proofs) that would warrant band 5 or 6.

annotations.comment: The research question is clearly articulated and connects the Voronoi and TSP models to practical aims, demonstrating focused relevance and coherence.
The aim and rationale are sufficiently described but could be more concise. Avoid verbatim citations within main narrative.
Reference to Smith et al. (2020) lacks page or section detail; include more precise citation to enhance credibility.
The personal context about connectivity at grandparentsâ house effectively introduces student engagement, enhancing authenticity.
The IB code repeated on multiple pages interrupts professional flow; remove or consolidate these administrative details.
Table caption âsite coordinates for each of the coordinatesâ is unclear and redundant. Revise to describe content succinctly.
Figure 1 is well integrated but legend placement could overlap the image. Ensure clear separation of caption and graphic.
Coordinates table (Figure 2) effectively supports constructing the Voronoi diagram; clear labeling of axes strengthens mathematical communication.
Explanations of midpoint and gradient steps are logical, but the negativeâreciprocal gradient step contains a sign error. Recalculate $$m_{AB}$$ and its reciprocal carefully.
Inline equation â$$\frac{1.76}{0.72}=2.44$$â contradicts the correct negative reciprocal; clarify and ensure consistent notation.
The transition to Excel computations is abrupt; integrate narrative to explain how Excel replicates manual steps for consistency.
Figure 3 table is comprehensive but overcrowded; consider splitting into two smaller tables or reducing columns.
Tables on pages 6â7 efficiently summarize equations but lack brief interpretive commentary between them; comment on emerging patterns.
The completed Voronoi diagram (Figure 4) is visually clear, aiding comprehension of coverage regions.
The conclusion that tower E covers the house is clearly drawn from the diagram, demonstrating accurate interpretation.
Introduction to TSP is thorough but lengthy; condense background to focus more on specific algorithm choices.
Weighted graph (Figure 5) is effective representation; ensure arrowheads and weights remain legible when printed.
Matrix of distances (Figure 6) uses bold zeros effectively; consider aligning decimal places for improved clarity.
The algorithm description list is clear but repeats steps found in textbook; reflect on modifications for this context to show independence.
Table for Nearest Neighbour steps (Figure 7) is corrupted by OCR errors; reconstruct neatly and explain each selected move.
The Hamiltonian cycle notation $$A\to C\to B\to D\to E\to F\to G\to A$$ is precise and clearly presented.
Upper bound calculation is succinct but does not comment on the error margin of rounding; include brief discussion.
Description of Deleted Vertex and Primâs algorithms demonstrates correct procedural understanding, though could reflect on alternative MST methods.
Table 8 shows some missing gridlines; ensure consistent table formatting to avoid visual clutter.
Lower bound interval $$1703.19\le w\le2252.17$$ is well synthesized, summarizing the TSP solution effectively.
Fuel consumption section integrates environmental analysis well; consider adding a sensitivity check for fuelârate variations.
Emissions calculation formulas are clearly presented; ensure units (kg CO$_2$) are consistently formatted in math mode.
Conclusion reiterates findings succinctly but could include a reflection on unexpected insights for deeper critical analysis.
Reflection section lists valid assumptions and limitations, but lacks quantitative sensitivity analysis; include brief test of one assumption.
Evaluation proposes realistic improvements (heat maps, 3D mapping) showing creative initiative; well aligned with personal engagement.
